sections.paragraph:
to marvel, to wonder. (Ch. תְּוַהּ id., the labial letters being interchanged. As to the origin, see more, page 203, B. ) Constr. absol. Isa 29:9 followed by עַל of cause, Ecc 5:7 pregn. Isa 13:8, אִישׁ אֶל־רֵעֵהוּ יִתְמָהוּ “they shall be astonished, and look at one another,” compare Gen 43:33. Sometimes more forcibly, to be smitten with fear and terror, Psa 48:6 Jer 4:9 Ecc 5:7 Job 26:11.

Hithpael, id. Hab 1:5.

Derivative, תִּמָּהֹון, and-
